mapper.select:
select pri.id,pri.request_id,pri.material_id,pri.material_code,pri.material_name,pri.specification, pri.unit,pri.request_number,pri.sort_number,pri.remark,pri.create_time,pri.update_time,pri.deleted, pr.request_no requestNo,pr.title requestTitle from purchase_request_item pri left join purchase_request pr on pr.id=pri.request_id
and pri.material_code like concat('%',#{q.materialCode},'%')
and pri.material_name like concat('%',#{q.materialName},'%')
and pri.request_number between #{q.requestNumberBegin} and #{q.requestNumberEnd}
order by pri.sort_number asc, pri.id asc

select pri.id,pri.request_id,pri.material_id,pri.material_code,pri.material_name,pri.specification, pri.unit,pri.request_number,pri.sort_number,pri.remark,pri.create_time,pri.update_time,pri.deleted, pr.request_no requestNo,pr.title requestTitle from purchase_request_item pri left join purchase_request pr on pr.id=pri.request_id where pri.id = #{id}
select max(sort_number) from purchase_request_item where request_id = #{requestId} and deleted = 0
